meta.title: TiDB Cloud Instance Capacity Plan | Apply for Higher-Scale Cluster Capacity
meta.description: Apply for the TiDB Cloud Instance Capacity Plan for agent and application platforms running large numbers of Starter instances and branches.

props.headline: TiDB Cloud Instance Capacity Plan
props.subheadline: Scale TiDB Cloud for every user application.

primaryCta.text: Apply for the Instance Capacity Plan

props.title: Apply for the Instance Capacity Plan
props.subtitle: Tell us what you're building and the scale you expect. Our team will review your application and contact you about eligibility and onboarding.

props.title: Built for teams creating databases at platform scale
props.subtitle: The Instance Capacity Plan is designed for products that provision and manage large numbers of databases on behalf of their users. It is a strong fit for agent platforms, app builders, and multi-tenant products that need to create and operate many isolated environments at scale.

items.title: AI Agent Platforms
items.description: Generate or deploy user applications with isolated environments.

items.title: Multi-tenant SaaS Platforms
items.description: Create isolated environments per customer or workspace.

items.title: Builder Platforms
items.description: Rely on high volumes of TiDB Cloud Starter instances and branches.

props.title: Designed for high-scale TiDB Cloud usage

items.title: Large Numbers of Active Starter Instances and Branches
items.description: The plan supports organizations that need to create and manage large numbers of active Starter instances and branches.

items.title: Cluster and Branch Growth Evaluated at Organization Level
items.description: Pricing and limits are reviewed with Sales and not publicly self-serve.

items.title: Sales-Assisted Onboarding for Higher-Capacity Organizations
items.description: Our team will review your application and contact you about eligibility and onboarding.

props.title: Apply for the Instance Capacity Plan
